case_title: PETER KUNG VS. CRAIG KOHLER DBA ARTESANIAS et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRAIG KOHLER DBA ARTESANIAS
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF KUNG, PETER
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, PETER ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAIG KOHLER DBA ARTESANIAS JONES, COURTNEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUNG, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAIG KOHLER DBA ARTESANIAS JONES, COURTNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1727 CHURCH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $27,292.97 RENT, $1,875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,400.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,567.97, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT AGAINST CRAIG KOHLER IS LIMITED TO $7,290.00 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF KUNG, PETER
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, PETER
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $214.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, PETER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT CRAIG KOHLER DBA ARTESANIAS JONES, COURTNEY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT UPON STIPULATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CRAIG KOHLER DBA ARTESANIAS
